original_file: Chat with your Canvas, DB Metrics, Network flows
email_subject: Chat with your Canvas, DB Metrics, Network flows
email_body:
Railway Logo



***************

Changelog Time!

***************



It's Friday and you know what that means! Here's a summary of the stuff we shipped this week:



* Chat with your canvas to Priority Boarding

* Postgres metrics

* Network flows

* Fixes and improvements



Read the changelog ( https://railway.com/changelog/2026-02-13-chat-with-your-canvas?utm_campaign=Changelog&utm_content=Changelog+Template&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



If you have any thoughts/feedback on the changes we're making, reach out on Central Station ( https://station.railway.com/new?type=feedback&utm_campaign=Changelog&utm_content=Changelog+Template&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )!



Regards,



Your friends at Railway
